title: Hire a specialist to get a UK charity set up on Monday
excerpt:
Does anyone have experience of helping a charity get set up on Monday? 
We are a small core team working with a lot of external collaborators (charity clients and volunteers / suppliers) who will need access to certain b…

posts.author: sianh (Sian Haestier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone have experience of helping a charity get set up on Monday?

We are a small core team working with a lot of external collaborators (charity clients and volunteers / suppliers) who will need access to certain boards.

Migrating over from a custom system and keen to take advantage of the opportunity to streamline how we operate.

I’d be interested to speak to some specialists with experience in this area and get an idea of costs and timelines.

Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sianh Welcome to the Community!
I work for JT’s Cloud and my team have had experience both working with not for profits and charities and bringing them together on monday.com so they can collaborate together.
Feel free to book a time in below to meet and discuss how we can assist you migrating to monday.com
Book Meeting Here

Kind regards,
Alex Robinson

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sianh,

Welcome to the community I’m the founder of Kick Consulting. My Team and I have extensive experience working with companies who engage multiple external collaborators. We helped them streamline the process reducing the number of boards they needed to use.

I would love to see how we can assist you with this. You can contact me through here.

Look forward to hearing from you,
Elena Korolkova

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Sianh!

We at Omnitas Consulting are preferred platinum partners and work internationally with big and small organisations helping them get the most out of monday.com.
One of our clients in a big None-profit organisation that helps to organize all 6000 none-profit organisations in the region. Here is som short info about them: https://malmoideella.se/kontakta-oss/in-english/
All 6000 organisations are external collaborators for them.

We are used to doing complex migrations from all kind of systems til monday.com and have developed custom scripts for this.

Please reach out to monday@omnitas.se and lets book a meeting for an initial dialogue.

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
This is something that is well within my skill set and I would be interested in hearing more on what you are wanting done.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson.56782@gmail.com
Best Wishes,
Andrew
